summary: Second‑set only recording; reviewers lament missing first set but give no feedback on sound or performance.
review: Both reviewers note that this file contains only the second set, leaving the first set unavailable without setting up a streaming node. No comments are made about the audio fidelity or musical highlights, so the assessment focuses solely on the incomplete nature of the release.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief reviews, both centered on the missing first set; no information on performance or recording quality to boost the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments about clarity, mix, or source; cannot assess technical quality beyond noting the incomplete set.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Only second set is present; reviewers express disappointment that the first set is absent.
